reason: Agent successfully received message, processed it, and returned correct response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded with sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260427-063023-zips" agent in sidebar — Agent opened with idle status
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status badge confirmed "idle" in the header
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field and sent button clicked, agent transitioned to "working" state
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received within 2 seconds, agent status returned to "idle"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the answer, confirming correct behavior
